name: FaceTec
description: FaceTecs 3D face authentication SDK provides certified liveness detection and face matching using depth data, widely embedded in identity verification platforms for strong anti-spoofing.

seo.title: FaceTec — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: FaceTec: FaceTecs 3D face authentication SDK provides certified liveness detection and face matching using depth data, widely embedded in identity verification

when_to_use: 3D liveness detection for KYC identity document verification
Biometric face match for returning user re-authentication
Anti-spoofing enforcement for regulated VASP onboarding
Selfie-to-ID document matching for remote bank account opening
Embedded liveness SDK for mobile KYC app integration

pros: 3D depth liveness resists photo and mask spoofs
Works on standard smartphone front cameras
cons: SDK only, not a full KYC workflow
Licensing costs add up for high-volume apps
Uses proprietary 3D method, no open standard
review.verdict: Gold-standard 3D liveness SDK, best slotted into your own KYC flow, not used as a full platform.
review.best_for: IDV vendors and apps that need certified anti-spoof liveness inside an existing onboarding flow
review.not_for: Teams wanting a turnkey KYC platform with document checks, screening and case management
